abilities.name: Demise (Desolate Core)
abilities.text: When this model is killed, it heals 4 and replaces with an Ashen Core. Then, summon a Dust Storm in base contact with any table edge.

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

actions.name: Desolate Shaping
actions.effects: Damage from this attack is irreducible. If the target is not a peon and is killed, this model may summon an Abomination within 1" of it.

actions.name: Suffocating Dust
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack has a raise value of 3.
actions.effects: For each raise this action receives, the target gains this model's choice of a Staggered, Injured, or Slow token.

triggers.name: Choke
triggers.text: Enemy models within (1)3" with an Injured token are dealt 1 damage.

triggers.name: Severe Injury
triggers.text: When resolving, if the target has an Injured token, deal +1 damage to it. Otherwise, it gains an Injured token.

actions.name: Whirlwind of Scrap
actions.effects: Move this model up to 12" directly toward the target.

triggers.name: Rusted Winds
triggers.text: Enemy models moved through this way gain an Injured token.

triggers.name: Forethought
triggers.text: This model gains an Adaptable token.
